keyFeatures.en: AI-powered video and image generation with intuitive no-code interface
keyFeatures.zh: AI驱动的视频和图像生成，具有直观的无代码界面

keyFeatures.en: Real-time collaboration tools for creative teams
keyFeatures.zh: 面向创意团队的实时协作工具

keyFeatures.en: Extensive library of pre-trained AI models for various creative tasks
keyFeatures.zh: 针对各种创意任务的广泛预训练AI模型库

description.en: Basic access to AI tools with limited credits
description.zh: 有限积分的基本AI工具访问权限

weaknesses.en: Pricing and credit system not transparent without account creation
weaknesses.zh: 定价和积分系统不透明，需要创建账户才能查看

weaknesses.en: Limited information about specific technical limitations and output quality
weaknesses.zh: 关于具体技术限制和输出质量的信息有限

targetAudience.en: Creative professionals, designers, filmmakers, and artists looking to integrate AI into their workflow
targetAudience.zh: 寻求将AI集成到工作流程中的创意专业人士、设计师、电影制作人和艺术家

positioning.en: Democratizing AI-powered creativity through accessible, no-code tools for visual content creation
positioning.zh: 通过易于使用的无代码工具，普及AI驱动的视觉内容创作
